title: Stir-Fried Broccoli with Kenyan Spices
description: A flavorful and spicy stir-fry dish made with broccoli, inspired by Kenyan cuisine. Serve with your favorite rice or noodles.

ingredients.name: kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: blend of garlic, ginger and cumin

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the kenyan spices and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the broccoli and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the chili flakes and soy sauce. Stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
